sections.biography-source-undefined: King Midang was a ruler of the Qiang tribe during the Three Kingdoms era. In the novel, he allied with Shu at the urging of Xi Zheng but later surrendered to Wei due to a ploy by Chen Tai. After submitting to Guo Huai, he led Wei officers to Jiang Wei’s main camp, where he was promptly executed.

full_text:
King Midang 迷當大王
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
King Midang (迷當大王). Qiang chieftain. Allies with Jiang Wei against Wei. Defeated by Chen Tai. King Midang may not have existed in history. King Midang was affiliated with Qiang and the Shu Kingdom.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms:109
BiographySource Undefined
King Midang was a ruler of the Qiang tribe during the Three Kingdoms era. In the novel, he allied with Shu at the urging of Xi Zheng but later surrendered to Wei due to a ploy by Chen Tai. After submitting to Guo Huai, he led Wei officers to Jiang Wei’s main camp, where he was promptly executed.
